title: The Cog Works SMP Pack
description: this is the modpack used by the triggeredfloof and friends during the Cog Works SMP on youtube.
body:
hello and welcom
this is the Cog Works SMP modpack
this ths the pack used in the hit youtube seres The Cog Works SMP.

if you wish to play this pack on a dedicated server [this](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-cog-works-smp-modpack-(server-version)) is a link the the server version of the pack 

this mod pack focuses on the Create mod as well as many of its addons in adition to others sutch as Farmer's Delight and William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere.

As i am requiered to link back to forge for quark here is hte link: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)

recomended 5000 megabites java memory.
you change this by going to setings over writing global memory ant seting the memory use.
